story: After his wife’s funeral, an old man returns to his isolated farm, loses pigeons to a fox, and sets seven heavy traps in the woods. During the same storm, a distant neighbor’s basement floods; a woman chained by the wrist drowns there, and a small boy is left alive on the top bunk. The next day, while collecting the traps, the old man finds a dead boy with his leg crushed in one of them. A younger boy nearby runs toward a higher house in the trees, and the old man follows.
implausible_knowledge: During the same storm, a distant neighbor’s basement floods; a woman chained by the wrist drowns there, and a small boy is left alive on the top bunk.
question: When he reaches the higher house, what will he most plausibly do?
answer_with_knowledge: Rush into the house and head for the basement to rescue the child.
answer_without_knowledge: Hide briefly outside, then enter cautiously with the rake in his hand.
